body: TUNGSTEN SMITHING -- pass 25 report. Shipped WARRANT#38 -> SLS(53)/9.67: forge-indicate r3 (Pillar C disagreement-aware). ComputeRelationshipDisagreementTrim wired live into the existing conviction trim chain -- same always-on/bounded/fail-open pattern as WARRANT#22/23/30, currently a no-op until a real calibration populates the relationship cache. Compiled clean, identity invariant verified. Continuing to forge-edge-2 r4 next, then I will pause with a full status report -- worth flagging now: the deeper stages left in both agents (S1-S5/PBO gates, Sigma convergence, the live Bayesian core, identity-invariant proof via differential replay) all structurally require an actual completed Strategy-Tester run to validate, which needs your separate explicit per-run consent naming MetaTrader/Strategy Tester. No amount of further scaffolding satisfies that -- so full completion of the doctrine has a real floor I cannot build past alone.
